summary: Full E2E testing of JurnalMap (backend + frontend). 14/14 pytest backend tests passed in 28s (projects CRUD with cascade, async PDF upload, summary 5-8 claims, /pdf binary, evidence with tier/bbox, outliers single+multi doc, comparison matrix with 5 fields, ask with citations + tier, 400 on empty question, 400 on non-PDF). Frontend Playwright smoke test passed end-to-end: home heading + Lima Pilar + new-project dialog + project card creation; project page tabs (baca/bandingkan/tanya); upload-dropzone → status-processing → status-ready; DocumentReader dual-panel (left-pdf + right-summary) renders react-pdf; 6 claim cards; claim click renders evidence + highlight overlay; OutlierMap SVG; matrix-generate populates matrix-table; ask-input → ask-answer-0 rendered with citations/tier. LLM (Gemini 3 Flash via emergentintegrations) is currently working; older budget-exceeded error in logs was historical and not reproduced.

issues: Radix DialogContent missing `aria-describedby`/Description — a11y warning in console. Add <DialogDescription> or aria-describedby={undefined} for screen readers.

action_items: Optional a11y: add DialogDescription to NewProject dialog to silence Radix accessibility warning.
Optional perf: pass willReadFrequently:true to canvas getContext in PdfViewer to silence Chrome Canvas2D warning (cosmetic).

Single-doc ask flow: when project has 1 doc and question is loosely related, BM25 yields 0 hits → answer becomes 'Tidak ditemukan fragmen relevan' (overall_tier=low). This matches spec ('if excerpts insufficient, tier=low + answer says so'), so working as designed — flagging for awareness.
critical_code_review_comments: server.py @app.on_event('shutdown') uses deprecated FastAPI event handler — consider migrating to lifespan context manager (non-blocking).
schemas.utcnow_iso/new_uid imported in server.py but not used (minor unused import).
process_document is async and called via BackgroundTasks — works because FastAPI awaits async background tasks. OK.
evidence_service: tier fallback heuristic thresholds (BM25 >=8 → high) are arbitrary; tier purity relies on the LLM verdict working. Acceptable for MVP.

qa_service: drops citations whose S-id the model omits from `used_sources`. If the LLM forgets to list any, the answer text remains but citations=[]. Consider keeping at least the top-scoring excerpt as a fallback citation when overall_tier!='low'.
seed_data_creation: Two tiny in-memory PyMuPDF PDFs generated per test run (/tmp/jurnalmap_test.pdf, /tmp/jm_outlier2.pdf, /tmp/jm_async.pdf, /tmp/jm_cascade.pdf, /tmp/ui.pdf). All TEST_-prefixed projects auto-deleted via fixtures + post-run cleanup curl.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Use /app/backend/tests/test_jurnalmap_api.py as the regression suite. Backend URL is read from /app/frontend/.env REACT_APP_BACKEND_URL. Each full run consumes ~6 LLM calls (≈3 summarise + 1 evidence + 1 matrix + 1 ask). If you see 'Budget exceeded' from litellm, the EMERGENT_LLM_KEY budget is depleted and processing will mark docs as failed — this is the only known fragile path.
